yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_June_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for June 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 206 Vulnerabilities Including Three P"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-19"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_15000_WordPress_Websites_Cleaned_Up_in_S {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for 15,000 WordPress Websites Cleaned Up in SocGholish Botnet Takedown"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-19"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WordPress" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "SocGholish" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: [containerd] Patch releases addressing CVE-2026-50195, CVE-2"; content:"CVE-2026-50195"; nocase; sid:7311378; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
